{% if cards.is_empty() %}
No documents matching "{{ q }}".
{% else %}
{{ cards.len() }} documents for "{{ q }}"
{% for c in cards %}

{{ c.name }}

{% if c.category == "runbook" %} runbook {% elif c.category == "ticket" %} ticket {% elif c.category == "postmortem" %} postmortem {% elif c.category == "kb" %} kb {% elif c.category == "change" %} change {% else %} {{ c.category }} {% endif %} {{ c.id }}
similarity
{{ c.score }}

{{ c.preview }}

metadata 
{{ c.metadata_json }}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
